title: CoAP request accepts NULL payload with nonzero length
description: Trigger: a caller uses the public lichen_coap_request() or lichen_coap_post_cbor() API with payload == NULL and payload_len > 0. lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_client.c:343-344 forwards req->payload and req->payload_len directly into Zephyr's coap_client_request, and the wrapper at lines 410-424 does not reject this invalid pair. Impact: a malformed local API call can make the Zephyr CoAP client read from a NULL payload pointer while serializing the request instead of returning LICHEN_COAP_ERR_INVALID_PARAM. Fix by rejecting payload == NULL when payload_len > 0 at the public entry point and adding a focused test.
close_reason: Completed: lichen_coap_request() and lichen_coap_post_cbor() now reject NULL payload with nonzero payload_len using LICHEN_COAP_ERR_INVALID_PARAM.
